series_metadata.series_description: The Returned Warrants consists of warrants which were returned to BWC that was issued to the claimants, medical providers, attorneys, employers, and vendors. The Returned Warrants are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Digitally image Returned Warrants into UDS and verify scanned images quality assurance. paper documents 30 days, and ; Electronic: provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and
